name: Infected Mite

attacks.name: Infected Leap
attacks.tell: It patrols slowly until it spots something, then closes in with an aggressive leap.
attacks.howToAvoid: Back away or sidestep before impact.
attacks.notes: Its most common way to open combat at close range.

attacks.name: Spore Shot
attacks.tell: It pauses for a moment and spits an explosive spore at distant targets.
attacks.howToAvoid: Move sideways when the projectile leaves and do not stay in its line.
attacks.notes: The direct hit does little damage, but the attached explosion is the truly dangerous part.

description: An infected variant of the lawn mite. It has far more health than a normal mite and mixes persistent jumps with spore projectiles.
behavior: It patrols a small area and breaks that route to chase a threat once spotted. It moves relatively slowly, but makes up distance with sudden leaps.
interactionWithPlayer: It is hostile to the player and does not flee when hurt. If you stay at range it can alternate between charging in and firing explosive spores.
interactionWithCreatures: It attacks most creatures on sight except other infected ones, with which it usually stays neutral until splash damage starts a fight.
strategy: Do not underestimate the shot just because the direct hit barely scratches. The real danger is the secondary blast, so move laterally and finish it quickly with chopping, slashing, or fresh damage.
respawnInfo: 1 day by default. Outside the Haze it takes 3 days.
specialTraits: It is immune to gas hazard. The spore shot carries explosive resistance on the projectile, so the initial tap is misleading and the real threat is the detonation.
